positive: A minimalist and sophisticated celestial fauna composition. Feature a stylized, majestic fox sitting poised on a crescent moon, surrounded by abstract nebula dust and floating cosmic geometric shapes (e.g., minimalist pentagrams, spirals). The fox must have clean, sharply defined silhouette lines and an ethereal, watercolor-stained fur texture in shades of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and warm violet. The composition should be centralized, utilizing negative space effectively. Use a highly graphic, woodcut engraving style mixed with luminous bioluminescence and Art Deco symmetry. Strong contrast is key, emphasizing the clean black silhouette against the vibrant, gradient nebula background. Print-ready, high detail, vector quality lines.
negative: blurry, deformed, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, low detail, photographic, realistic photo, clutter, messy background
